ruleVersion: latest as of 2026-06-08, derived from V3 runbook/review log

overall.criticalFinding: F-15 failed again: after multiple expert turns plus text and two voice interactions, full-summary modal showed only the topic and no meaningful summary points.

taxonomy.PASS: Complete test executed; all pass criteria passed.
taxonomy.PARTIAL: Complete test executed, with demonstrated product pass/fail split.
taxonomy.FAIL: Complete test executed; required product outcome failed.
taxonomy.UNDETERMINED: No product verdict because required user outcome could not be executed or verified.
taxonomy.BLOCKED: QA execution could not complete because a required environment/capability was unavailable.

functionalMatrix.verified: Disclaimer appeared before use; emergency/service/privacy content, privacy link, and consent action were visible; accepting unlocked homepage.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified in first-visit run.

functionalMatrix.verified: Hot topic preserved in chat and controls became usable in 3 timed runs.
Fake mic Mandarin WAV activated recording; STT 200 returned materially correct sleep-problem transcript; transcript appeared and could enter recommendation flow.
Recommendations, categories, expert cards, and reasons appeared for the custom sleep topic in 3 timed runs.
Selected expert count changed 3 -> 2 -> 3; final set carried forward.
Start Discussion entered /group/chat with selected experts and topic; chat controls became usable.
10 non-empty TTS/MP3 assets captured; ffprobe/volumedetect shows non-silent audio; TTS query text matches visible discussion topic/speaker context.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Actual browser/system speaker output to a user was not captured; missing/cut-off playback cannot be ruled out. Local Whisper transcription timed out and is not used as proof.
functionalMatrix.reason: Environment constraint remains: headless Chromium/host lacks reliable real output capture; assets are supporting evidence only.

functionalMatrix.verified: Multiple visible speaker states progressed; multiple non-empty TTS assets were captured across discussion turns.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Separate audible turns, voice-to-speaker match at device output, and absence of audible overlap/stall were not verified.
functionalMatrix.reason: Actual device/browser audio output capture unavailable.

functionalMatrix.verified: Text was submitted; subsequent TTS response content addressed half-night waking and daytime fatigue.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: None for content path; real speaker playback remains covered by F-06.
functionalMatrix.reason: Semantic response content verified via captured TTS response text/audio asset.

functionalMatrix.verified: Pause and resume UI states appeared; session remained intact.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Actual audible speech stop/resume and no duplicated audio were not verified.
functionalMatrix.reason: UI state alone is insufficient for product verdict under latest rule.

functionalMatrix.verified: Summary opened early and clearly stated conversation content was too limited; modal remained readable with actions.
Back opened confirmation dialog with cancel/confirm actions; cancel state was captured after flow.
Recording UI activated; two stop actions returned STT 200; transcripts materially matched Mandarin sleep request; later expert responses addressed sleep interruption.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: None for STT path; actual audible reply playback remains covered by F-06.
functionalMatrix.reason: Click-to-toggle PTT and repeat STT interaction verified.

functionalMatrix.verified: Full-summary test executed after custom topic, expert turns, text interjection, and two voice interactions; summary modal opened.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Summary contained only the topic and no meaningful conversation points.
functionalMatrix.reason: Confirmed product issue: useful non-empty summary content absent despite sufficient tested history.

functionalMatrix.verified: 390x844 viewport had no horizontal overflow; core homepage controls remained usable.
Completed latest-rule journey without user-visible crash, freeze, unexpected reload, or blocked core action.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Engineering warnings: 72 failed requests, mostly third-party ad/activeview aborts; 3 zero-byte TTS responses; 2 response.body capture errors.
functionalMatrix.reason: Warnings did not block observed core user flow; kept in appendix.

performanceSummary.reason: Actual device output unavailable; returned assets do not prove heard playback.

performanceSummary.area: Speaker transition / pause / resume audible timing

sttResponses.body: {"text":"這是一段語音辨識測試。我最近晚上睡不好，半夜常常醒來，想請專家提供改善睡眠的建議。這是一段語音辨識測試，我最近晚上睡不好，半夜常常醒。","language":"zh"}
{"text":"這是一段語音辨識測試。我最近晚上睡不好，半夜常常醒來想想。","language":"zh"}
{"text":"這是一段語音辨識測試。我最近晚上睡不好半夜。","language":"zh"}

audioResponses.text: 哎呀，又見到您啦！真開心，這麼快又再會面了。
大家好，我是白大衛，做內科健康陪伴的，主要從生活習慣切入。其實半夜醒來這件事，要先想想自己的生活有沒有什麼變化。
不對，光是生活習慣變化這句話說得太輕巧了點
其實半夜醒來和白天疲累，這兩個訊號要一起看，不是單一的睡眠問題。
我覺得除了生活習慣，我們還要看看半夜醒來的「內容」是什麼？
睡眠中斷的背後，可能還有更深層的情緒或壓力因素。
不過要小心，半夜醒來也可能是一些身體問題的預警信號。
這種情況下，要先看看有沒有服用什麼新的藥物，這是一個很常見的變因。
從預防醫學角度，我們會先評估是否有潛在的睡眠呼吸中止症。

engineeringAppendix.whisperNote: Local Whisper turbo and tiny transcription attempts timed out in this run; audio proof relies on ffprobe/volumedetect plus captured TTS response text, not user-heard playback.
